—
 bld_apothecary
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — The green half-timbered cottage with a row of pink/blue/yellow potion bottles plus the circular mortar-and-pestle emblem reads clearly as an apothecary. Clean outline, consistent light, good readability. The badge clips slightly past the right magenta bound but stays legible. — —
—
 bld_bakery
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — Reads strongly as a bakery: warm cream facade, red-and-white striped awning, a lit window and clustered round loaves on the counter, with a smoking chimney. Confident outline and good contrast. Subject and craft are solid. — —
—
 bld_barn
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — Instantly reads as a barn via the deep-red gambrel roof, big cross-braced double doors and the gold hayloft triangle. Strong silhouette, clean confident outline, good contrast on both backgrounds. Framing is well-centred. — —
—
 bld_brewery
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — Reads as a brewery: the domed copper kettle/still venting steam on the roof, two banded wooden barrels at the base and a side tankard all signal brewing. Warm palette with decent depth. The kettle and barrels are a touch dark/muddy but still legible at size. Brighten the copper still slightly and add a small highlight to the barrels so they pop from the brown facade. —
—
 bld_bridge
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — Clear stone arch bridge: gray voussoir-radiating arch, a railed deck with four posts, and a band of blue water with white ripple lines beneath. Clean outline and good material read. Sits low in the box but composition is fine. — —
—
 bld_castle
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — Strong castle read: central crenellated keep with a dark barred portcullis arch, flanking battlemented towers with gold-lit windows, and a red triangular pennant on top. Cool stone palette with good contrast and a clean silhouette. Framing is well-centred. — —
—
 bld_castle
Vector icon (animation) player-facingbuildings
 good — A crenellated blue-grey keep with a gate and two glowing windows; the red flag on the left turret clearly waves, changing its furl and length frame to frame while the masonry stays rigid. This is well-judged secondary motion that suits the subject and the flag returns to a similar shape so it loops acceptably. No blow-out or drift. — —
—
 bld_clock_tower
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — Reads instantly as a clock tower: tall tapering tower, dark pointed spire with a gold finial, a clear white clock face with hands, and an arched doorway. Cohesive purple-stone palette with good contrast on both grounds. Well-centred and clean. — —
—
 bld_cottage
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — Classic cottage: warm cream walls, thatched/timber gable roof with radiating straw lines, a paned yellow window, an arched brown door and a brick chimney puffing smoke. Clean outline, consistent warm light, good contrast. The base housing archetype reads well. — —
—
 bld_cottage
Vector icon (animation) player-facingbuildings
 good — A clean cream cottage with a brown thatched roof, arched door and warm yellow window; the only moving element is the dusky chimney smoke, which puffs upward and dissipates frame to frame so the body stays correctly rigid. Motion is subtle, organic and well-suited to a home; first and last frames sit at a low-smoke point so it loops without a hard jump. No blow-out, flicker or drift. — —
—
 bld_fishmonger
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — Reads as a fishmonger stall: blue scalloped awning, a fish-shaped sign on top, and a counter of gray/pink fish laid out on a pale (ice) tray. Cool palette suits seafood and the fish sign clinches the meaning. Composition sits a bit low but is legible. — —
—
 bld_forge
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — Strong forge read: gray stone smithy with a tall chimney (faint smoke), a brightly glowing orange furnace/doorway, and a dark anvil with spark dots in front. The hot orange glow against cool gray gives excellent contrast and immediately signals a forge. Clean and well-composed. — —
—
 bld_granary
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — Reads clearly as an elevated grain store: tan plank body with a dark round vent, steep brown hipped roof, and four short legs lifting it off the ground. Clean confident outline, consistent top-left light, good contrast on both backgrounds. The small ladder/steps at lower-left are a touch muddy at icon size but the silhouette is distinct from the cottages. — —
—
 bld_harbor_dock
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — Instantly reads as a dock: brown plank jetty on pilings over a stylised blue water block, with a mooring bollard/rope ring and a yellow lamp post. Light direction and outlines are consistent with the family and it is highly distinct from every other building. Water highlights are clean, not muddy. — —
—
 bld_hearth
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — Clear hearth: warm grey stone surround with a chimney stack on top and an orange/yellow flame glowing in the arched firebox. Good warm-glow contrast against the dark stone, clean outline, distinct from the chimneyed cottages. The faint smoke puffs above bleed slightly past the design box but are minor. — —
—
 bld_inn
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — Reads as a larger lodging house: two storeys of tan wall with multiple amber-lit windows, a dark gable roof, a central arched door, and a green lantern on a bracket arm to the left signalling 'inn'. The two-storey mass and the hanging sign make it clearly bigger and distinct from the single cottages. Outline and light are consistent with the family. — —
—
 bld_kitchen
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — Communicates 'kitchen' via a black cauldron with a glowing fire under it sitting in the open arched doorway, plus a smoking chimney and a lit window — a small house dedicated to cooking. Warm glow contrasts well and the cauldron silhouette is legible. Slightly busy in the dark doorway at small size but it still parses as a cookhouse. — —
—
 bld_larder
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — Clearly a food store: a green-roofed open-fronted hut showing colourful shelved jars/produce inside plus a wooden barrel beside it. The shelving and barrel make 'larder/pantry' read well and it is distinct from the cottages via the green roof and open storefront. Clean outlines and good contrast on both backgrounds. — —
—
 bld_lighthouse
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — Textbook lighthouse: tapered red/white banded tower on a dark rocky base, glazed lamp room with a glowing yellow light casting two beams left and right. Highly readable, instantly distinct from every other building, with clean flat shading and good silhouette. The symmetric beams sit nicely against both light and dark halves. — —
—
 bld_market_stall
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — Reads as a vendor stall: brown counter under a red-and-white scalloped awning with bread/produce displayed on top. The awning and laid-out wares clearly say 'market', distinct from the enclosed buildings. Outlines are clean and the red awning gives strong colour identity; the goods are a little generic but legible. — —
—
 bld_market_stall
Vector icon (animation) player-facingbuildings
 good — A wooden counter stacked with produce under a red-and-white scalloped awning; the awning ripples and its lower edge sways frame to frame like cloth in a breeze while the stall stays put. The cloth motion is organic and on-theme and the start/end frames are close enough to loop without a jump. Clean drawing, no artifacts. — —
—
 bld_mill
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — Clearly a windmill: tapered tower with a small red cap, a lit window, and four cream lattice sails crossing in front. The sail cross is the dominant readable feature and distinguishes it cleanly from all the houses (it correctly shares art with bld_windmill). Confident outline and consistent light; sails read well even at small size. — —
—
 bld_mining_camp
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — Reads as a mine: a dark domed tunnel mouth set into a rocky mound, with a crossed pickaxe leaning on a timber frame and a small ore cart of grey rocks to the right. The tunnel-plus-tools combo communicates 'mining camp' well and is distinct from the buildings. The dark interior is a bit heavy but the props rescue readability. — —
—
 bld_observatory
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — Clear observatory: a navy domed cupola with a slit through which a brass telescope tube points up at a yellow star, atop a dark stone tower with a lit window. The dome+telescope+star trio reads instantly and is unique in the family. Cool blues with the warm telescope/star accents give good contrast on both backgrounds. — —
—
 bld_portal
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — A dark purple horseshoe arch frames a bright violet swirling vortex with a few star dots, reading clearly as a magic portal. Strong glow contrast and clean rounded outline; light direction is consistent. It is distinct from every other building in the family. — —
—
 bld_sawmill
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — A timber cabin with stacked log ends at the base and a large grey toothed circular saw blade leaning against it, instantly reading as a sawmill. Clean outlines, warm consistent palette and a clear glowing window. The saw blade is the strongest, most distinct identifier in the batch. — —
—
 bld_smokehouse
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — A dark timber smokehouse with a peaked roof, faint grey smoke wisps rising from the ridge and a glowing ember doorway with a hanging item (fish/meat) inside. The rising smoke plus glowing fire clearly communicate 'smokehouse'. It is fairly dark but the warm doorway glow gives enough focal contrast. — —
—
 bld_stable
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — A gambrel-roofed barn in warm browns with a yellow hay bundle in the loft and a grey horseshoe over the stall doors, which together read clearly as a stable. Clean confident outline and good contrast between the tan body and dark trim. Distinct from the plainer huts in the family. — —
—
 bld_tent
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — A classic red-and-white striped peaked tent with a scalloped valance, a gold pennant flag on top and a glowing entrance, reading instantly as a market tent. Bold high-contrast colour makes it pop and it is the most distinct icon in the batch. Clean outline and consistent lighting. — —
—
 bld_tower
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — A grey stone cylindrical tower with a blue conical roof, gold finial and a glowing arched window, reading cleanly as a watch tower. Crisp brickwork, good rim light and strong contrast. Note it is pixel-identical to bld_watchtower (intended shared art per sharedWith). — —
—
 bld_watchtower
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — Identical artwork to bld_tower: grey stone turret, blue cone roof, gold finial, glowing arch window. Craft, framing and readability are all solid. This duplication is intentional (sharedWith bld_tower), so it is consistent by design rather than an accidental look-alike. — —
—
 bld_watermill
Vector icon (still) player-facingbuildings
 good — A timber-frame house with a brown spoked water wheel on the right and small blue water droplets, clearly reading as a watermill. Warm palette, clean window glow and the wheel is a strong distinct identifier versus the windmill and sawmill siblings. Lighting and outline are consistent with the family. — —
—
 bld_watermill
Vector icon (animation) player-facingbuildings
 good — The dark spoked water-wheel beside the red-roofed mill rotates steadily while small blue water-splash flecks animate at its base, giving two coordinated layers of believable motion. Both wheel rotation and the splash cycle return close to their start so the loop reads smoothly. Solid, characterful drawing with no glow flash or teleport. — —
—
 bld_windmill
Vector icon (animation) player-facingbuildings
 good — The four cream sails clearly rotate a full revolution across the 14 frames against a tan tower with a glowing window, which is exactly the right motion for the subject. The spin is even and the sail cross returns near its start orientation so the loop closes cleanly. The drawing is a touch flat (sails are plain bars) but reads instantly and shows no flashing or popping. — —
—
 block
Vector icon (still) player-facingexistingMine
 good — A clean isometric cube with a pyramidal cap, crisp dark outline and a clear top-light gradient on the facets; the bevelled edges and vertical seam marks read convincingly as a cut stone block. Centred well within the box and reads clearly on both light and dark grounds. The little triangular notch at the apex is a touch fussy but harmless. — —
—
 bomb
Vector icon (still) player-facing(aliases)
 good — Instantly reads as dynamite: three red sticks, central binding strap, lit fuse with a yellow spark star. Strong dark outline and good red gradient give it punch. Well-centred within the box. — —
—
 bond_rank_7
Vector icon (still) player-facingfixed-icons
 good — Clean glossy heart with a confident dark outline and a clear white '7' coin badge bottom-right; reads instantly as a bond rank. Light direction is consistent (highlight upper-left), contrast holds on both backgrounds. Slightly small within the 64px box but well-centred on the content. — —
—
 bond_rank_8
Vector icon (still) player-facingfixed-icons
 good — Identical heart to rank 7 but with a gold badge ring signalling the max rank, which is a smart distinction; the '8' is crisp and legible. Gloss and outline are consistent with its sibling. The gold ring reads as 'special/max' at a glance. — —
—
 boon_coin_mult
Vector icon (still) player-facingfixed-icons
 good — A warm radial-glowing orange orb with a bright central highlight plus the gold X badge reads clearly as a coin multiplier and is the strongest of the mult trio. Good size, centred, strong contrast on both backgrounds, consistent badge. The glow gives it a satisfying 'value' feel. — —
—
 boss_diff_stars
Vector icon (still) player-facingfixed-icons
 good — A rounded glossy plaque with three lit gold stars and two unfilled outlines reads instantly as a difficulty/rating gauge. Filled-vs-empty contrast is clear and the lit stars glow warmly. Well-centred and sized; consistent with the family's glossy rounded-rectangle style. — —
—
 boss_ember_drake
Vector icon (still) player-facingcharacters
 good — Strong silhouette: dark horns, slit-pupil yellow eyes, white fang teeth and a glowing orange-to-dark-red gradient body read instantly as a fire monster. Clean confident outline and good contrast on both backgrounds; the ember-dot accents in the ring reinforce the theme. Centered and fills the box well without clipping. — —
—
 boss_frostmaw
Vector icon (still) player-facingcharacters
 good — Pale blue glowing face with cyan eyes, an ice-spike crown and a fanged mouth reads clearly as a frost/ice boss and contrasts well against ember_drake. The translucent frosty puff bubbles on the shoulder add theme; outline is clean. Well centered and framed within the box. — —
—
 boss_frostmaw_v2
Vector icon (still) player-facingcharactersV2
 good — Clear frost identity: icy blue body, cyan glowing eyes, a spiky ice-crown silhouette up top, and two lower fangs (the 'maw'). Cohesive with the family's badge framing and the cool gradient reads cold instantly. Outline is crisp and contrast against both backgrounds is good. — —
—
 boss_old_stoneface
Vector icon (still) player-facingcharacters
 good — A boxy weathered-stone face with cracks, glowing amber eyes, a clenched stone-block mouth and green moss patches reads convincingly as a stone golem and is clearly distinct from the rounder bosses. Earthy brown palette with consistent shading and a clean heavy outline. Centered and framed cleanly with the shoulder silhouette grounding it. — —
—
 boss_old_stoneface_v2
Vector icon (still) player-facingcharactersV2
 good — Reads clearly as a stone/golem boss: grey square head, glowing amber eyes, a bolted/gritted mouth and green moss patches at the corners selling age and 'stone'. The angular head contrasts nicely against the soft round heads of the rest of the family while staying in-style. Clean outline, good gradient and centering. — —
—
 boss_quagmire_v2
Vector icon (still) player-facingcharactersV2
 good — Clearly a swamp creature: green body, twin antennae, big amber eyes, lower fangs and a small red ladybug accent on the forehead add a bog-critter charm. Cohesive with Mossback and Quagmire-green siblings yet distinct via the antennae silhouette. Outline, shading and framing are clean. — —
—
 boss_storm_v2
Vector icon (still) player-facingcharactersV2
 good — Excellent concept read: a dark blue scowling cloud with angry brows, glowing eyes, falling rain dashes and a bright yellow lightning bolt instantly says 'storm'. The bolt provides a strong focal pop against the moody palette and the silhouette is the most distinct in the set. Confident outline and clean contrast on both backgrounds. — —
—
 bread
Vector icon (still) player-facingcraftedProducts
 good — Clean confident dark outline, warm gold-to-brown gradient with a soft top highlight and three diagonal score marks reading clearly as a baked loaf. Light direction is consistent (upper-left) and contrast holds on both backgrounds. Well centred within the design box with a grounding shadow. — —
—
 bug_bee
Vector icon (still) unusedcritters
 good — Instantly reads as a bee: bold yellow body with confident black stripes, dark head with a single eye, antennae, and two translucent blue-grey wings. Clean outline, good contrast on both backgrounds, consistent glossy light from upper-left. Framing is centered and fills the box without clipping. — —
—
 bug_bee
Vector icon (animation) player-facingcritters
 good — Translucent blue-grey wings clearly beat up and down across frames against a cleanly banded yellow/black body with rounded shading, giving a convincing flutter. The body stays anchored in its cell with no drift, and the first/last frames are close enough to loop. Genuine wing articulation, not a whole-icon slide. — —
—
 bug_butterfly
Vector icon (still) unusedcritters
 good — Reads immediately as a butterfly: dark segmented body, two antennae, and four symmetric wings (orange-peach upper pair with eyespots, golden lower pair). Symmetry is clean, outlines are confident, and the warm gradient fits the family. Well centered and contained within the magenta box. — —
—
 bug_butterfly
Vector icon (animation) player-facingcritters
 good — Orange eyespotted wings open from a near-closed sliver to a full spread and back, a clear organic flap that suits a butterfly, with a well-drawn dark segmented body. Motion is real articulation rather than a rigid shift, though the spread amplitude varies a touch unevenly between cycles. Loops acceptably from the narrow end frames. — —
—
 bug_caterpillar
Vector icon (animation) player-facingcritters
 good — The segmented green body visibly bunches and stretches with the prolegs shifting underneath and the red antennae bobbing, producing a believable inch-worm undulation that suits the subject. The cute white-eyed face stays readable and the motion loops smoothly without popping or drift. Real body articulation rather than a rigid slide. — —
—
 bug_ladybug
Vector icon (still) unusedcritters
 good — Instantly and unambiguously a ladybug: round red domed shell with a central seam, black spots, dark head, and tiny legs peeking out. Strong contrast on both backgrounds and a clean glossy highlight giving consistent upper-left light. Well centered and fully contained. — —
—
 cat
Vector icon (still) player-facingtoolsFarm
 good — Front-facing seated cat with pink ears, green eyes, pink nose and a curling tail reads instantly as a cat. The brown gradient body is smooth, outline is confident, and framing is centred. — —
—
 cat_bird
Vector icon (still) player-facingtileCategories
 good — Instantly reads as a small bird: round body, beak, eye highlight, fanned tail, perched on a brown branch. Clean thick outline, consistent warm orange-brown palette, good silhouette and centring. The faint vertical wing-stripes add detail without muddying it. — —
—
 cat_birds
Vector icon (still) player-facing(aliases)
 good — Reads clearly as a bird: round body, head with a white eye, orange beak, fanned tail and a wood-toned body gradient. Outline is confident and the perch grounds it. Centred and fills the box well. — —
—
 cat_cattle
Vector icon (still) player-facingtileCategories
 good — Clearly a cow: cream body with black spots, horns, pink muzzle with nostrils, sturdy legs. Flat fills with confident dark-brown outline match the family style well and it is nicely centred. Black spots stay legible on both light and dark grounds. — —
—
 cat_fish
Vector icon (still) player-facing(aliases)
 good — Clean sardine silhouette with a blue-grey body gradient, gill line, fins and forked tail; reads as a fish at a glance. Dark teal outline and subtle highlight give good contrast on both backgrounds. The slightly drooping lower jaw is the only soft spot. — —
—
 cat_flowers
Vector icon (still) player-facingtileCategories
 good — Reads immediately as a flower: pink rounded petals, yellow center, green stem and leaves. Clean outlines and good contrast on both backgrounds, well centred. Distinct enough from the grass icon despite both using a daisy motif because of scale and the dominant bloom. — —
—
 cat_grain
Vector icon (still) player-facingtileCategories
 good — Clearly a wheat/grain stalk: paired golden ears of overlapping kernels on a brown stem with awns at the top. Outlines and palette are consistent with the family and contrast is good on both grounds. Slightly tall/narrow but well centred within the box. — —
—
 cat_herd_animals
Vector icon (still) player-facingtileCategories
 good — Reads clearly as a sheep: cloud-like cream fleece, dark brown face with curled horn, stubby legs, closed-eye expression. Flat fills and outline match the family. One caveat: the white fleece has low contrast against the light half and relies on its tan outline to stay legible there, but it still holds. Consider a slightly darker fleece outline/shadow to lift the white body off light backgrounds. —
—
 cat_mine_coal
Vector icon (still) player-facing(aliases)
 good — Faceted black polyhedron with subtle grey facet lines and light speckle dots reads as coal/black ore. The gradient keeps it from being a flat silhouette and the dots add mineral texture. Shares the faceted-rock form with stone but the near-black value keeps it distinct. — —
—
 cat_mine_gem
Vector icon (still) player-facing(aliases)
 good — Reads immediately as a faceted gemstone: pentagonal cut with internal facet lines, cyan-to-white gradient and two highlight glints. Dark teal outline gives strong contrast on both halves. Centred and fills the box cleanly. — —
—
 cat_mine_stone
Vector icon (still) player-facing(aliases)
 good — Faceted grey polyhedron with facet lines and a few speckle dots reads cleanly as plain stone. Light-to-dark grey gradient and dark outline give good form. Distinct from coal (value) and iron ore (no metal vein), so family separation holds. — —
—
 cat_special_dirt
Vector icon (still) player-facing(aliases)
 good — Reads clearly as a dirt/soil mound: domed brown form, scattered pebbles and dimples, plus a small green sprout on top. Bold outline and warm earthy gradient give it good presence. Well-centred and fills the box. — —
—
 cat_treasure
Vector icon (still) player-facing(aliases)
 good — Reads as a golden coin/medallion: ridged rim, inner ring and an embossed four-point star, with a glossy highlight. Strong gold gradient and dark outline make it pop on both backgrounds. Centred and clean. — —
—
 cat_trees
Vector icon (still) player-facingtileCategories
 good — Clearly a coniferous tree: stacked triangular green tiers, brown trunk, gold star topper and a few lighter baubles. Outlines and flat greens match the family and it is well centred. Distinct from the grass and flower icons. — —
—
 cat_wood
Vector icon (still) player-facingtileCategories
 good — Instantly reads as wood: a cylindrical brown log with concentric end-grain rings on the top face and vertical bark seams down the side. Flat fills, dark outline and good contrast on both backgrounds, well centred. Cleanly on-style and distinct. — —
—
 cauldron
Vector icon (still) unusedtoolsPortal
 good — Instantly reads as a witch's cauldron: a dark rounded pot on three legs, filled with a bright bubbling green potion and two curling wisps of steam rising off it. Strong silhouette, good contrast of the toxic-green liquid against the near-black body, and the rim highlight plus bubbles add life. The three legs are a touch short/stubby under the heavy bowl but it still sits convincingly. — —
—
 char_bram
Vector icon (still) player-facingcharacters
 good — A serious bearded man with a dark brown beard, a face scar/mole and a grey blacksmith/mason hammer reads clearly as a craftsman character; the cool grey-blue ring and shoulders separate him from the warmer townsfolk. Clean outlines, consistent light, good contrast on both backgrounds. Well centered and the hammer prop is legible at the lower-left without clipping. — —
—
 char_bram_v2
Vector icon (still) player-facingcharactersV2
 good — Reads clearly as a rugged bearded villager man; the heavy brows and large dark beard give a serious, weathered character that differs from the clean-shaven characters. The small red mouth peeks through the beard, which is a nice touch, and the grey-blue tunic sets him apart. Craft is clean with consistent eye style and good centering. — —
—
 char_liss
Vector icon (still) player-facingcharacters
 good — A friendly bald-fronted face in a maroon hood/wimple with rosy cheeks and a small gold cross pendant reads instantly as a nun or sister, matching the 'Sister Liss' label. Warm maroon palette is distinct in the set and the craft is clean with a soft smile. Centered and framed well; the cross is small but legible. — —
—
 char_liss_v2
Vector icon (still) player-facingcharactersV2
 good — Reads immediately as a nun/sister: purple wimple-style hood, peaceful closed eyes with rosy cheeks, and a clear gold cross at the chest naming her devotional role. The cross is a strong identity anchor and the muted purple distinguishes her from the warmer characters. Clean lines, balanced framing and good contrast. — —
—
 char_mira
Vector icon (still) player-facingcharacters
 good — A cheerful young woman with a brown bun, gold earrings, rosy cheeks and an orange tunic with cream trim reads as a warm townsperson, distinct from Liss and Wren by hair and dress. Clean outline, consistent flat shading and good contrast. Well centered and fills the box; nothing clips the bounds. — —
—
 char_mira_v2
Vector icon (still) player-facingcharactersV2
 good — Reads as a cheerful young woman: neat brown top-knot bun, a small flower accent, big friendly eyes with a highlight bloom, and an orange pinafore/overall. She is clearly distinct from Wren and the workers via hairstyle and warm orange outfit. Shading is smooth, outline clean and she is well centered in the box. — —
—
 char_tomas
Vector icon (still) player-facingcharacters
 good — An elderly man with a tan wide-brimmed hat (band plus a small gold pin), bushy brows and a full white beard reads clearly as 'Old Tomas' and is distinct from the other hatted figures by his white beard and cream ring. Clean confident outline, warm palette, good contrast. Centered; the hat brim reaches near the side bounds but stays inside. — —
—
 char_tomas_v2
Vector icon (still) player-facingcharactersV2
 good — Clearly an elderly man: closed happy eyes (laugh lines), a large white beard and moustache, and a straw brimmed hat with a small gold accent sell an old farmer/elder. He reads as distinctly aged versus Bram's dark beard via the white beard and warm gold palette. Clean craft, good contrast and centering. — —
—
 choice_log
Vector icon (still) unusedfixed-icons
 good — An open tan book with ruled lines on the left page and a column of red-checked and empty checkboxes on the right reads cleanly as a choice/decision log. The checkbox ticks are legible and the book outline is confident. Well-centred and consistent with the family's glossy style; good despite being a removal-candidate. — —
—
 chowder
Vector icon (still) player-facingrecipes
 good — Clean wide bowl with a creamy surface dotted with chunks (corn, herbs), wavy steam wisps and a wooden spoon handle jutting from the right read instantly as chowder/soup. Light is consistent top-left, outline is confident, rim highlight crisp. The blue-grey lower bowl is a touch cool/metallic but doesn't hurt readability. — —
—
 clear
Vector icon (still) player-facing(aliases)
 good — Reads as a scythe: curved steel blade with a highlight mounted on a banded wooden handle held at an angle. Good contrast between the cool blade and warm handle. The blade-to-handle join is a little loose but the tool reads instantly. — —
—
 cocoa
Vector icon (still) player-facingfish
 good — A tidy pyramid of 5-6 glossy brown beans, each with a center seam and a clean dark outline; light direction is consistent and contrast against both backgrounds is fine. Reads clearly as a clustered bean pile, appropriate for processed cocoa. Well centered within the magenta box, no clipping. — —
—
 compass
Vector icon (still) unusedtoolsSea
 good — Strong wooden/brass bezel ring, cream dial with tick marks, an 'N' marker and a clear red-and-white needle make this read instantly as a compass. Centred well within the box with a believable thumb loop at top. Clean confident outline and good contrast on both backgrounds. — —
—
 copper_bar
Vector icon (still) player-facingmissingItems
 good — Clean trapezoidal ingot with a warm copper gradient (lighter top bevel, darker base) and a single highlight stripe; thick dark outline matches the family. Color clearly distinguishes it as copper. Well centered and reads instantly as a metal bar. — —
—
 cozy_barrel
Vector icon (still) unusedcozyDecor
 good — Instantly reads as a barrel: convex stave body, three banded hoops, and a visible top rim with a lighter vertical plank highlight for form. Warm brown gradient, clean confident outline, consistent top-left light, no muddy or pillow-shaded areas. Well-centred and fills the box without clipping. — —
—
 cozy_birdhouse
Vector icon (still) unusedcozyDecor
 good — Clearly a birdhouse: triangular dark-red shingled roof, tan plank body, round dark entry hole, perch dowel and a mounting post below. Good contrast, consistent light, clean outline, no artifacts. Well-framed within the box. — —
—
 cozy_flower_pot
Vector icon (still) unusedcozyDecor
 good — Reads immediately as a flower pot: terracotta tapered pot with dark rim, green stems and leaves, and three distinct daisy-like blooms (pink, orange, purple) with yellow centres. Cheerful colour pop distinguishes it from the brown-heavy siblings, clean outlines and shading. Centred and unclipped. — —
—
 cozy_flower_pot
Vector icon (animation) player-facingcozyDecor
 good — A small striped bee flies in an orbit around the flowers (entering low-left, arcing up among the blooms), which gives lively, charming motion appropriate to a flower pot. The flowers themselves stay static but the bee's path carries the scene well and eases naturally. The pot and multi-color blooms are nicely drawn and the bee re-enters cleanly for the loop. — —
—
 cozy_fountain
Vector icon (animation) player-facingcozyDecor
 good — The central water plume rises and falls and small droplet specks lift and settle around the basin, giving a believable trickling-fountain motion. The motion suits the subject and the basin/column drawing is clean with a nice teal water palette. Loop looks continuous with no hard jump. — —
—
 cozy_lantern
Vector icon (still) unusedcozyDecor
 good — Clearly a lantern: hanging ring at top, dark metal frame with glass panels, warm orange flame and a soft yellow glow halo selling the light. Strong warm contrast against both backgrounds, clean outline, good craft. Well-centred, glow stays inside the box. — —
—
 cozy_lantern
Vector icon (animation) player-facingcozyDecor
 good — The whole lantern rocks side-to-side as a clean pendulum hinged at the top ring, with a warm glow and matching ground shadow that tracks the sway. Motion is organic and perfectly suits a hanging lantern; the underlying drawing (amber glass panes, grey cap, ring) is crisp. First and last frames sit near the swing extreme so the loop reads smoothly. — —
—
 cozy_mailbox
Vector icon (still) unusedcozyDecor
 good — Reads instantly as a mailbox: domed blue box with a curved highlight, raised red flag, small round indicator, mounted on a brown post. Blue+red palette makes it distinct from the family, clean glossy shading and outline. Centred and unclipped. — —
—
 cozy_picket_fence
Vector icon (still) unusedcozyDecor
 good — Unmistakably a picket fence: four pointed white pickets joined by two horizontal rails. Cool grey-white gradient reads as painted wood and sets it apart from the warm siblings; clean outlines and subtle shading. Well-centred and fills the box without clipping. — —
—
 cozy_signpost
Vector icon (still) unusedcozyDecor
 good — Reads clearly as a signpost: central post with a small capped top and two arrow-shaped wooden boards pointing opposite directions, each with an engraved bar. Warm wood gradient and outline consistent with the family, good contrast. Centred with a grounding shadow, no clipping. — —
—
 cozy_street_lamp
Vector icon (still) unusedcozyDecor
 good — Clearly a street lamp: dark iron post on a flared base, peaked glass lantern head with warm yellow panes and a soft glow halo. Good dark-vs-warm contrast, clean outline, consistent craft; distinct from the hanging lantern by its tall standing post and base. Well-framed, glow stays in bounds. — —
—
 cozy_well_bucket
Vector icon (still) unusedcozyDecor
 good — Reads as a water bucket: tapered staved wooden body with metal bands, an arched handle and a clear blue water surface with an ellipse highlight on top. Warm wood plus blue water gives good identity, clean outline and shading. Centred and unclipped. — —
—
 cozy_wind_chime
Vector icon (animation) player-facingcozyDecor
 good — The round wooden clapper/striker swings on a thin string from center out to the side and back in a clear pendulum arc, which is the natural motion for a chime. The tubes and disc stay mostly fixed but that is acceptable; the swing carries the animation and reads organically. Drawing is tidy (wood disc, silver tubes, string) and the loop returns toward center cleanly. — —
—
 craft_queue
Vector icon (still) player-facingfixed-icons
 good — A classic gold-sand hourglass with brown caps plus a faint circular progress arc around it reads instantly as 'crafting in progress'. The sand split (top full, bottom filling) sells the timing idea, and the arc reinforces queue progress. Centred and well-contrasted; the arc is a touch faint but works. — —
—
 crop_corn
Vector icon (still) unusedcrops
 good — A clear vertical cob rendered as a honeycomb grid of yellow kernels with a brown outline and two splayed green husk leaves at the base, plus little silk tendrils up top. Strong contrast and centred well in the box; reads instantly as corn at small size. The kernel grid is slightly mechanical/uniform but it is legible and on-style. — —
—
 crop_lettuce
Vector icon (still) unusedcrops
 good — A layered green head with ruffled outer-leaf lobes and a lighter radiating core with vein lines, shaded darker at the edges. Reads clearly as a leafy head and is distinct from the other greens. Slightly soft/airbrushed in the gradients but the form is confident and well centred. — —
—
 crop_onion
Vector icon (still) unusedcrops
 good — A teardrop golden-brown bulb with vertical layer lines, a glossy highlight, three green shoots up top and a small root wisp at the bottom. Clearly an onion and well differentiated from garlic by its warm amber color and green tops. Clean outline, good contrast, nicely centred. — —
—
 crop_peas
Vector icon (still) unusedcrops
 good — A horizontal green pod with a dark outline, opened to show five bright round peas in a row, with a stem tail. Instantly reads as peas/pod and is visually distinct from the other greens. Composition sits a touch low-left of centre but stays inside the box; outline is confident and contrast is strong. — —
—
 crop_peas
Vector icon (animation) player-facingcrops
 good — An open green pod with a row of round peas swings up like a pendulum from a low droop to a raised diagonal across the strip, the strongest and most organic motion in the set. Peas catch light and the leaf/stem follows through naturally; the arc is clear and pleasing. Loop is acceptable, with first and last frames in compatible swing positions. — —
—
 crop_potato
Vector icon (still) unusedcrops
 good — A rounded tan-brown lumpy tuber with a thick dark outline and scattered darker eye spots plus a soft highlight. Clearly reads as a potato and is distinct from the onion via its irregular blobby shape and spot detail. Well centred and good contrast on both halves. — —
—
 crop_pumpkin
Vector icon (still) unusedcrops
 good — A wide squat orange pumpkin with vertical rib shading, a glossy highlight and a chunky green stem on top. Unmistakably a pumpkin, strong silhouette, good warm contrast against both backgrounds. Centred well and fills the box nicely. — —
—
 crop_sunflower
Vector icon (still) unusedcrops
 good — A classic sunflower with a dotted dark-brown seed disc, a ring of pointed golden petals, and a green stem with two leaves below. Reads instantly and is the only flower in the set so very distinct. Clean and well centred; petals are a touch flat/uniform but craft is solid. — —
—
 crop_sunflower
Vector icon (animation) player-facingcrops
 good — The brown seed-disc and golden petal ring are well drawn with a clear face, and across frames the head rocks and the petal tips flicker/twinkle so it reads as genuinely animated, not frozen. Motion is organic and suits a flower; first and last frames sit close enough to loop without a hard jump. No glow blowout or drift out of cell. — —
—
 crop_watermelon
Vector icon (still) unusedcrops
 good — A dark-green striped whole melon paired with a cut wedge showing red flesh, pale rind and black seeds. The whole-plus-slice combo reads instantly and is distinct from the other greens via the red wedge. Nicely composed and high contrast; the pairing slightly crowds the box but stays within the magenta bounds. — —
—
 crop_wheat
Vector icon (animation) player-facingcrops
 good — A tied bundle of golden stalks sits on a small base, and the splayed grain heads at the top visibly fan/sway left-right between frames so motion is present and reads as wind catching the wheat. The drawing is a touch dark and the binding/stem area is muddy, but identity is clear and the loop returns cleanly. No flashing or teleporting. Lighten the lower stalk/binding slightly so the form reads better against the dark background half. —
—
 crossroads
Vector icon (still) unusedfixed-icons
 good — Two wooden arrow-shaped signboards on a post, one pointing right and one left with a small grass tuft, reads clearly as a crossroads/decision point. Wood grain shading is warm and the outline is confident; opposing arrows sell the 'branching paths' idea. Centred and consistent with the family despite being a removal-candidate. — —
—
 crystal_ball
Vector icon (still) unusedtoolsPortal
 good — Reads immediately as a fortune-teller's crystal ball: a glossy purple sphere with a bright specular hotspot and a soft C-shaped reflection, seated on a small dark wooden cradle/stand. The glassy gradient and rim-dark outline give a convincing translucent orb, and the inner glow sells the magic. Framing is well centered within the box. — —
—
 crystals
Vector icon (still) unusedtoolsPortal
 good — Clearly a crystal cluster: three tall faceted shards (blue, green, purple) of varying height rising from a dark rocky base, each with clean facet planes and bright edge highlights. The faceting and color variation read as gems rather than glass, and the central green spire anchors the group well. Distinct from the single crystal_ball thanks to the angular multi-shard silhouette. — —
—
 cur_embers
Vector icon (still) player-facingcurrencies
 good — A dark-rimmed orb with a hot orange radial glow, a white-hot center and several dark spark/crack lines radiating out, plus two small floating spark dots above — instantly reads as embers/fire energy. Light direction and the soft outer bloom are convincing and the contrast holds on both backgrounds. Sits centered and fills the box well. — —
—
 cured_meat
Vector icon (still) player-facingcraftedProducts
 good — Rich terracotta-brown ham body with a glossy highlight, capped by a tan bone shank that reads as the classic 'ham hock' silhouette. Outline is clean and the two-tone form has clear volume. The bone tilts out of frame toward the upper-left but stays inside the magenta bounds. — —
—
 cut_gem
Vector icon (still) player-facingexistingMine
 good — A cyan octagonal gem with radial facet lines and a bright sparkle burst at the centre, clearly reading as a polished/cut gem and distinct from the rough tile_mine_gem crystal. Strong contrast, clean dark outline, white facet highlights and corner sparkles give convincing brilliance. Well centred and fills the box nicely. — —
—
 cutscene_start
Vector icon (still) unusedfixed-icons
 good — A glossy cream speech bubble with a tail and a bold red play triangle inside reads clearly as 'start cutscene/play dialogue'. The play triangle has good contrast against the light bubble and the bubble tail confirms it as dialogue. Well-centred, confident outline, consistent gloss with the family. — —
—
 daily_chest
Vector icon (still) unusedfixed-icons
 good — Clear wooden treasure chest with raised lid, gold-coin clutter inside and bright yellow banding on the front panel reads instantly as a rewards chest. Outline is clean and confident, light reads from upper-left, contrast holds on both backgrounds. Well-centred and fills the box without clipping. — —
—
 dangers_header
Vector icon (still) player-facingfixed-icons
 good — Unmistakable hazard triangle with a dark exclamation mark, warm amber gradient and a heavy brown bevel give it weight and good contrast on both halves. Outline is crisp and the symmetry is clean. Sits slightly low/right of centre but stays inside the box. Nudge the triangle up and left a touch to centre it on the crosshair. —
—
 decor_apple_sapling
Vector icon (still) player-facingdecorations
 good — A round green canopy of four overlapping leaf-clusters with three red apples sits on a curved trunk in a terracotta planter; reads instantly as a fruiting sapling. Light direction is consistent (top-left highlights on apples and leaves), outline is clean and confident, and the planter has nice rim/body separation. Well-centred and fills the box without clipping. — —
—
 decor_cairn_shrine
Vector icon (still) player-facingfixed-icons
 good — Reads clearly as a balanced stack of smooth grey stones (a cairn) with green moss accents and a small lit candle/flame finial, fitting the shrine label. Cool steel-blue stone shading is clean with a confident dark outline. The little orange offering at lower-right is a touch ambiguous but doesn't hurt the read. — —
—
 decor_cobble_well
Vector icon (still) player-facingdecorations
 good — A pitched dark-red shingled roof on timber posts over a round stacked-cobble base with a blue water pool and a small bucket on a rope reads immediately as a well. Cobbles have rounded radial shading that reads as stone, and the roof/post/water hierarchy is clear. Centred and balanced within the box. — —
—
 decor_fishing_dock
Vector icon (still) player-facingdecorations
 good — A plank dock on stilts over a rounded blue water patch, with a lantern on a post at left and a cleat/peg plus a small fish at right, reads clearly as a fishing dock. Wood plank shading and the water highlight ripples are clean, and the lamp adds purpose. Composition is balanced and nothing clips the bounds. — —
—
 decor_smelter_brazier
Vector icon (still) player-facingdecorations
 good — A dark metal bowl on three splayed legs holding glowing coals with a tall orange-yellow teardrop flame and spark dots reads instantly as a brazier. The warm radial glow behind the flame sells the heat, and the flame gradient (yellow core to red edge) is well handled. Centred and confidently outlined. — —
—
 decor_stone_lantern
Vector icon (still) player-facingdecorations
 good — A tiered pagoda-style lantern (pyramidal cap, a head with a warm yellow grille-lit window, and a tapered pedestal base) reads clearly as a stone lantern. The warm glow halo behind the light box conveys it is lit, and the blue-grey stone shading is consistent with the family. Two tiny green moss/leaf accents are a nice touch and not distracting. — —
—
 decor_topiary
Vector icon (still) player-facingfixed-icons
 good — Three stacked green spheres on a slim trunk in a terracotta planter reads immediately as a tiered topiary, with a small orange bud finial as a nice accent. Glossy spherical shading and a clean dark outline give it good form, light from upper-left is consistent. Well-centred and the pot grounds it nicely. — —
—
 decor_violet_bed
Vector icon (still) player-facingdecorations
 good — A round staved-wood planter filled with dark soil sprouting green stems topped by six purple five-petal flowers with yellow centres reads clearly as a violet flower bed. Flower clustering and the soil/stem/blossom layering are tidy, and the barrel staves give the tub good craft. Centred and well-framed. — —
—
 dirt
Vector icon (still) player-facingexistingFarm
 good — Reads instantly as a tilled soil/dirt block: warm brown rounded-square with a vertical light-to-dark gradient and scattered darker speckles and pebble dots that sell loose earth. Clean thick dark outline, consistent top-down light, well centred within the box. Contrast holds on both light and dark backgrounds. — —
—
 dish_cheese_wheel
Vector icon (still) unuseddishes
 good — Instantly reads as a cheese wheel: warm yellow gradient rind, characteristic holes on the top face, and a separate cut wedge in front for unmistakable read. Clean confident outline, consistent top-left light, and good contrast on both light and dark halves. Framing is well-centred and fills the box without clipping. — —
—
 dish_jam_jar
Vector icon (still) unuseddishes
 good — Clearly a jar of jam: deep red preserve visible through the glass with floating fruit specks, a cream label with text lines, and a gingham cloth cover tied over the lid. Clean outline, good contrast, and a believable glassy gradient; sits well within the box. Distinct from the other red item (the pie) thanks to the jar silhouette. — —
—
 dish_pie
Vector icon (still) unuseddishes
 good — Reads immediately as a fruit pie: golden lattice crust with red fruit filling showing through the diamonds, a fluted crimped edge, on a grey plate. Warm crust palette and consistent lighting fit the family. The fluted edge beads are slightly lumpy/uneven but acceptable at icon scale. — —
—
 dish_soup
Vector icon (still) unuseddishes
 good — Reads as a bowl of soup: orange broth in a white bowl with green/red/yellow vegetable pieces and two wisps of steam rising. Clean outline, good light, and the steam clearly signals 'hot'. It is conceptually close to the stew but stays distinct via the open white bowl versus the black cauldron. — —
—
 dish_soup
Vector icon (animation) player-facingdishes
 good — Orange soup in a white bowl with green/red veg bits; faint steam wisps rise and drift above the bowl, shifting position and opacity frame-to-frame while the bowl stays still. The steam motion is organic and reads correctly as a hot dish, and the surface bits shimmer subtly. First/last frames are close enough to loop without a hard jump. — —
—
 dish_stew
Vector icon (still) unuseddishes
 good — Clearly a stew: a black cast-iron cauldron with handles brimming with brown chunky stew (meat and vegetable bits) and rising steam. The dark metallic body has clean highlights and good contrast, reading well on both backgrounds and centred in the box. Distinct from the soup by virtue of the cauldron silhouette and chunkier, darker contents. — —
—
 dish_stew
Vector icon (animation) player-facingdishes
 good — Black cast-iron cauldron with chunky orange/brown stew and green herb specks; the surface chunks and bubbles shift slightly across frames so it reads as a gentle simmer, while the rigid pot stays put. Motion is subtle but clearly present and suits a stewing pot. Loop is smooth with no popping or whiteout. Could push the bubble displacement slightly larger so the simmer is more obvious at small icon size, but not required. —
—
 diving_helmet
Vector icon (still) unusedtoolsSea
 good — The domed brass helmet with a blue glass porthole, bolt rivets around the rim and a small top valve reads immediately as a classic diving helmet. Glossy highlight on the glass and warm gold body give nice depth and good contrast on both backgrounds. Well centred and fills the box without clipping. — —
—
 drill
Vector icon (still) player-facingtoolsMine
 good — Bold red rectangular body with a top highlight strip, a downward pistol grip and a grey segmented conical drill bit pointing right reads immediately as a power drill. Strong contrast, clean outline and clear light direction. Well-centred and fills the box without clipping; the red body makes it pop on both backgrounds. — —
—
 drink_beer
Vector icon (still) unuseddrinks
 good — A full glass mug of amber beer with a billowing white foam head, rising bubbles, and a side handle reads instantly as beer. Clean outline, warm gradient, consistent top-left light and soft drop shadow. The handle pushes to the right edge so the mug body sits slightly left of the design-box center, but nothing clips the magenta bounds. Nudge the whole mug ~4px right so the body+handle are balanced within the box. —
—
 drink_beer
Vector icon (animation) player-facingdrinks
 good — Carbonation bubbles travel upward through the amber liquid and the white foam head jitters subtly, giving a believable fizzing-beer feel. Motion stays inside the glass rather than sliding the whole icon, and bubble positions cycle without an obvious teleport. Solid glass-with-handle drawing and clean foam. — —
—
 drink_coffee
Vector icon (still) unuseddrinks
 good — A white cup on a saucer brimful of dark-brown coffee with two rising steam wisps reads clearly as hot coffee. Confident grey outline, glossy cup highlight, and good light-vs-dark contrast on both backgrounds. Very close to the tea sibling in silhouette, but the darker liquid and absence of a teabag tag keep it distinct. — —
—
 drink_coffee
Vector icon (animation) player-facingdrinks
 good — A single steam wisp above the brown coffee curls and leans frame-to-frame while the cup stays anchored, which is exactly the right read for a hot drink. The wisp shape varies organically rather than sliding rigidly, and the loop returns to a low thin wisp without a hard pop. Underlying cup/saucer drawing is clean with good rim shading. — —
—
 drink_juice
Vector icon (still) unuseddrinks
 good — A tapered glass of bright orange juice garnished with an orange wedge and a pink-striped straw reads instantly as juice. Strong saturated fill, clean rim, nice vertical sheen highlight, consistent shadow. The orange-slice garnish overlaps the left rim slightly but stays well inside the magenta box. — —
—
 drink_smoothie
Vector icon (still) unuseddrinks
 good — A glass of thick pink-magenta smoothie speckled with seeds, topped with white foam and a teal straw, reads clearly as a berry smoothie and is well distinguished from the wine and juice by color and seed texture. Clean outline, nice sheen highlight, consistent shadow. Well centered and fully inside the box. — —
—
 drink_tea
Vector icon (animation) player-facingdrinks
 good — Two layered motions read clearly: steam rises off the amber tea and the square teabag tag on its string swings like a small pendulum across the frames. Both are organic, not whole-icon slides, and the swing eases at the extremes so the loop reads naturally. Nicely crafted cup with a visible string and tag. — —
—
 drink_wine
Vector icon (still) unuseddrinks
 good — A classic stemmed goblet half-filled with deep red wine, with a glossy bowl highlight and a footed base, reads instantly as red wine. Clean confident outline, good contrast on both backgrounds, well centered and fully framed. Clearly distinct from the other drinks by its stemware silhouette. — —
—
 dynamite
Vector icon (still) player-facingtoolsMine
 good — Three red sticks bound by a brown band with a curling fuse and a yellow spark star read instantly as dynamite. Stencil markings on the sticks are a touch noisy but the overall shape and lit-fuse cue are unambiguous. Clean outlines, good contrast, centred framing; the spark slightly approaches the top bound but stays inside. — —
—
 eggs
Vector icon (still) player-facingcraftedProducts
 good — Three pale speckled eggs sit in a brown cross-hatched basket with two yellow straw wisps, reading immediately as a nest/basket of eggs. Outline and weave pattern are tidy and the speckles add believable detail. Composition is well balanced and centred. — —
—
 explosives
Vector icon (still) player-facingrecipes
 good — Textbook dynamite: three red sticks banded with a dark central wrap, gold caps, and a curling fuse topped by a bright glowing spark. Reads instantly as explosives, strong contrast and a confident outline. The warm spark glow gives nice focal energy. — —
—
 fertilizer
Vector icon (still) player-facingtoolsFarm
 good — The rounded sack with a carry handle, a green NPK label, and a row of brown pellets at the base communicates fertilizer well. Outline and gradient are clean and the label text is crisp and legible. — —
—
 festive_bell
Vector icon (still) unusedfestive
 good — Reads instantly as a gold bell: trapezoidal body, clean dark outline, vertical glossy highlight and a clear clapper knob at the base. Red berry + green holly sprig on top adds festive context without clutter, and light direction is consistent. Well-centred within the box with a soft grounded shadow. — —
—
 festive_bell
Vector icon (animation) player-facingfestive
 good — The bell clearly rocks/rotates left and right like a real ringing bell, with the clapper and skirt shifting accordingly, and a holly sprig appears at the crown. Motion is organic pendulum rock rather than a rigid whole-icon slide, and it suits the subject. Gold shading is clean; loop returns near the upright start with no glow flash or drift. — —
—
 festive_gift
Vector icon (still) unusedfestive
 good — Immediately reads as a present: green box with lid, lighter ribbon band, and a gold bow with looped knot on top. Clean outline, consistent top-left light, subtle vertical gradient gives volume without muddiness. Well-centred and grounded. — —
—
 festive_gingerbread
Vector icon (still) unusedfestive
 good — Unmistakably a gingerbread man: rounded head with icing eyes/smile, stubby arms and legs, white icing cuffs and two candy buttons (red, green). Warm brown palette is appropriate, outline is clean and the pose is symmetric and centred. Buttons add festive colour pop. — —
—
 festive_gingerbread
Vector icon (animation) player-facingfestive
 good — The arms clearly raise and lower in an articulated wave while the legs shift slightly, giving a friendly character motion rather than a slide. The drawing is charming: brown cookie body, white icing trim, red/green gumdrop buttons, dot eyes and smile all read cleanly. No artifacts; loop returns to a similar arms-down pose. — —
—
 festive_ornament
Vector icon (still) unusedfestive
 good — Clear glossy red bauble with a gold cap and hanging cap loop on top, a jewelled gold band across the middle and a strong oval highlight selling the spherical sheen. Outline and light direction are consistent with the family and it is well-centred. Distinct from the bell despite both being gold-accented. — —
—
 festive_ornament
Vector icon (animation) player-facingfestive
 good — The gold equatorial band changes tilt angle across frames as if the sphere is slowly spinning, and the white specular highlight shifts to match, which sells subtle rotation. The glossy red sphere, gold cap and hanging loop are well drawn with believable specular and shadow. Motion is gentle but present; loop is close and there is no blown-out flash. — —
—
 festive_snowman
Vector icon (still) unusedfestive
 good — Reads instantly as a snowman: stacked white spheres with cool-blue shading for volume, coal eyes/buttons, orange carrot nose, red scarf and brown twig arms. Light direction and soft shading are clean and consistent with the family. Well-centred and grounded. — —
—
 festive_snowman
Vector icon (animation) player-facingfestive
 good — The brown twig arms clearly change angle/spread frame-to-frame while the red scarf flutters and extends sideways, giving lively organic motion against a static body. Drawing is clean: tiered white body, carrot nose, coal buttons read well. No blown-out flashes or drift; loop is acceptable with only a minor scarf-position difference end-to-start. — —
—
 festive_stocking
Vector icon (still) unusedfestive
 good — Clearly a hung stocking: red boot shape with a fluffy white cuff and two button details, plus a candy cane peeking out of the top for festive context. Deep-red shading gives volume and the outline is clean. Centred well with a grounded shadow. — —
—
 festive_wreath
Vector icon (still) unusedfestive
 good — Reads immediately as a wreath: ring of layered green needle-sprigs with varied tones for depth, scattered red berries and ornaments, and a red ribbon bow at the bottom. Composition fills the box nicely and is well-centred with good contrast on both backgrounds. Distinct from the holly despite shared greens and berries. — —
—
 festive_wreath
Vector icon (animation) player-facingfestive
 good — The multicolored lights (red/gold/blue) blink on and off at varying positions around the ring frame-to-frame, a believable twinkling-lights effect suited to a wreath. The wreath ring and red bow stay correctly anchored with no drift. Loop is seamless since twinkle is non-positional; no harsh white flash, just localized light dots. — —
—
 fish_oil
Vector icon (still) player-facingfish
 good — A rounded golden flask with a corked neck, two soft highlight blobs and a clean dark-brown outline; reads instantly as an oil/potion bottle. Color clearly distinguishes it from the dark ink bottle sibling. Well centered and fills the box nicely. — —
—
 fishing_rod
Vector icon (still) unusedtoolsSea
 good — The arced wooden rod with a grey spinning reel at the grip and a taut line ending in a red float/lure clearly reads as a fishing rod in use. The dynamic bend adds energy and the reel detail sells it. Outline and shading are consistent with the family, and it sits well within the bounds. — —
—
 flour
Vector icon (still) player-facingexistingFarm
 good — Clearly a flour sack: cream pouch with a cinched neck, a stamped wheat-ear emblem on the body, and little white powder puffs rising from the top that read as flour dust. Good soft gradient, a clean specular streak on the left, confident brown outline, nicely centred. Subject accuracy and readability are both strong. — —
—
 fruit_picker
Vector icon (still) player-facingtoolsFarm
 good — A long wooden pole topped with a metal claw/basket cradling an orange-red fruit reads correctly as a fruit picker. Clean outline, good metal shading, and the diagonal pose fills the box nicely. — —
—
 furn_bookshelf
Vector icon (still) unusedfurniture
 good — Instantly reads as a bookshelf: three shelves of bright varied book spines plus a small terracotta potted plant on the bottom shelf. Clean dark-brown frame, good contrast on both backgrounds, well centred within the box. Distinct from every sibling and one of the strongest icons here. — —
—
 furn_chair
Vector icon (still) unusedfurniture
 good — Reads immediately as a chair with a ladder back, seat and four legs in warm wood tones with confident dark outlines. Light direction is consistent and contrast holds on both halves. Slightly tall/narrow so it floats a touch high in the box, but framing is acceptable and it is clearly distinct from the table. — —
—
 furn_clock
Vector icon (still) unusedfurniture
 good — Clearly a clock — domed wooden case, white face with hands and tick marks, and a gold pendulum bob in a lower window. Clean outline, good contrast, well centred. Distinct in silhouette from the dresser and bookshelf despite sharing the brown palette. — —
—
 furn_clock
Vector icon (animation) player-facingfurniture
 good — The brass pendulum bob swings left-center-right-back convincingly and the minute hand ticks slightly, giving a believable clock motion; the case is rigid as expected. The pendulum arc reads as a proper pendulum rather than a jitter, and it loops without a teleport. Clean drawing with readable face and bob. — —
—
 furn_dresser
Vector icon (still) unusedfurniture
 good — Strong, legible dresser: a top lip plus three stacked drawers each with a pair of pale round knobs, on short feet. Clean nested outlines, consistent top-left light, good contrast on both backgrounds, well centred. Reads distinctly from the bookshelf thanks to the knobs and drawer fronts. — —
—
 furn_fireplace
Vector icon (still) unusedfurniture
 good — Reads instantly as a fireplace: stone surround with a wooden mantel and an arched black firebox holding orange flames with a warm glow. Good contrast and the glow bloom sits believably without washing out the form. Centred and distinct from all siblings. — —
—
 furn_fireplace
Vector icon (animation) player-facingfurniture
 good — The orange flame tongues genuinely rise, fall and change shape across frames with drifting ember spark dots and a flickering interior glow, while the grey stone surround correctly stays static. Loops cleanly with no hard jump and no white-out blowout. The clearest, most convincing animation in the batch with solid drawing craft. — —
—
 furn_lamp
Vector icon (still) unusedfurniture
 good — Clearly a lamp — trapezoidal glowing shade, slim stem and a weighted round base, with a warm halo that sells the 'lit' read. Light direction and contrast are consistent and it reads on both halves. The glow extends a bit beyond the design box but the lamp body itself is well framed. Optionally tighten the glow halo so it stays within the design box without spilling past the magenta bounds. —
—
 furn_lamp
Vector icon (animation) player-facingfurniture
 good — The warm halo around the shade breathes in and out and the shade brightness gently pulses, which suits a lamp; the brass stand and base stay still as they should. No harsh flash and the loop returns to its start state. Subtle but real glow animation, not a rigid slide. — —
—
 furn_mirror
Vector icon (still) unusedfurniture
 good — Reads as a mirror: gold oval frame with a pale blue reflective glass carrying two diagonal highlight streaks, propped on two angled legs. Clean outline and good contrast; the cool glass reads clearly as a reflective surface and is distinct from the family's warm wood pieces. Well centred in the box. — —
—
 furn_mirror
Vector icon (animation) player-facingfurniture
 good — A small sparkle appears then the diagonal highlight streaks sweep across the glass and a twinkle plays, an appropriate shine effect for a mirror; the gold frame and easel legs stay put. The motion is subtle and the streaks travel rather than just blink, and it loops acceptably. Nicely drawn gold frame and cool glass. — —
—
 furn_table
Vector icon (animation) player-facingfurniture
 good — The candle flame sways and changes shape frame to frame with a pulsing glow behind it, while the turned-wood table stays correctly static. Motion is localized to the flame so it reads as a candle rather than the icon shaking. Loops smoothly with no blown-out white frame. — —
—
 gem_amethyst
Vector icon (still) unusedgems
 good — A confident cluster of tall faceted purple crystals with a tall hero point flanked by shorter ones, clean dark-purple outlines, consistent upper-left light, and two sparkle accents. Reads instantly as amethyst and is well distinct from the single-gem siblings. Framing is good, sitting on a soft cast shadow within the box. — —
—
 gem_crown
Vector icon (still) player-facing(aliases)
 good — Clearly a crown: gold band with three points, blue/red/green pointed gems on the spires and three round blue cabochons across the front, on a red base. Rich gold gradient and dark outline read well at small size. Centred and fills the box. — —
—
 gem_emerald
Vector icon (still) unusedgems
 good — Classic emerald-cut rectangular stone with beveled corners, a clear table facet, bright diagonal highlight and two sparkles, in saturated emerald green with clean black outline. Highly readable and the distinctive step-cut shape sets it apart from the faceted sapphire/ruby. Well centred and fills the box nicely. — —
—
 gem_raw_crystal
Vector icon (still) unusedgems
 good — A cluster of pale blue-white quartz points with a tall central spire and smaller flanking crystals, cool grey facet shading and a clean outline, clearly reading as raw/rough crystal. It is structurally similar to the amethyst cluster but the cool colorless palette keeps it distinct. Good framing and believable faceting. — —
—
 gem_ruby
Vector icon (still) unusedgems
 good — A brilliant-cut red gem with a flat top table, radiating facet lines down to a point, rich crimson-to-dark-red gradient, dark red outline and two sparkles. Reads instantly as a ruby and the warm red clearly separates it from the blue sapphire of the same cut. Well centred with a soft contact shadow. — —
—
 gem_ruby
Vector icon (animation) player-facinggems
 good — Clean crimson faceted gem with crisp white facet edges and a believable glassy body. A diagonal sheen and top-facet glint travel across the frames, giving a gem-appropriate sparkle/twinkle rather than a rigid slide. First and last frames sit close enough to loop without a hard jump. — —
—
 gem_sapphire
Vector icon (still) unusedgems
 good — A blue brilliant-cut gem with crown facets, a bright upper-left highlight gradient and sparkles, with a heavy black outline reading as a deep sapphire. —
 gem_sapphire
Vector icon (animation) player-facinggems
 good — Deep-blue faceted gem with strong highlight clusters; a bright white sheen sweeps left-to-right across the facets through the mid frames, a classic gem shine. Motion is localized to the highlight, not a whole-icon slide, and suits the subject. Loop is acceptable as the glint exits and the gem returns to rest. — —
—
 gemcrown
Vector icon (still) player-facingrecipes
 good — Strong gold crown with a banded base, three pointed spires each topped by a faceted gem (pink, blue, green) and round jewels along the band. Reads instantly as a gem crown, good metallic shading and clean facets. The red base band gives nice contrast against the gold. — —
—
 gift_loves
Vector icon (still) unusedfixed-icons
 good — A bright pink heart with a darker crimson rim and three gold four-point sparkles reads instantly as 'loves'. Glossy highlight on the upper-left lobe gives nice form and the sparkles add affection without clutter. Good contrast on both halves and clean outline. — —
—
 gold_bar
Vector icon (still) player-facingmissingItems
 good — Bright yellow-gold ingot in the same trapezoid mold as copper/iron, with a glossy top bevel and bright highlight stripe that sells the precious-metal sheen. Color reads unmistakably as gold and is distinct from its siblings. Centered and clean. — —
—
 golden_carrot
Vector icon (still) player-facingtoolsPortal
 good — Reads cleanly as a golden carrot: a tapered ribbed root in warm gold tones with a fan of green leaves sprouting from the crown. —
 golden_idol
Vector icon (still) player-facingtoolsPortal
 good — Reads as a golden idol/totem: a stylized statuette with a broad angular headdress, a carved face with two eyes and a mouth, and a tapering pedestal body with engraved lines. —
 goldring
Vector icon (still) player-facingrecipes
 good — A perspective gold band with a clear inner hole and a faceted blue/white diamond mounted on top reads cleanly as a gem ring. Metallic shading and the gem facets are confident. It sits a hair low-and-right of centre and is fairly small in the box, but still legible. — —
—
 harvestpie
Vector icon (still) player-facingrecipes
 good — The crimped/beaded crust ring around a domed golden-brown filling plus two steam wisps reads clearly as a baked pie on a plate. Warm gradient gives a cozy bake look. —
 hay_bundle
Vector icon (still) player-facingmissingItems
 good — Rounded-square bale of golden straw with vertical stalk striations and two horizontal binding bands, plus a soft top highlight. Reads clearly as hay/straw and the warm yellow color is appropriate. Outline and shading are consistent with the family; well framed. — —
—
 hazard_cave_in
Vector icon (still) player-facingmineHazards
 good — A heap of faceted brown rocks with blue-grey highlight faces sits on a ground shadow, topped by a soft grey dust cloud, clearly reading as a rockfall/cave-in. —
 hazard_fire
Vector icon (still) player-facinghazards
 good — Clean teardrop flame with a warm yellow-orange-red gradient core, a dark outline, an orange brazier base, and three little ember sparks plus a soft radial glow that reads on both backgrounds. —
 hazard_lava

 good — A glowing orange-yellow lava pool with darker bubble blobs sits in a dark rim, with a translucent heat plume and yellow ember sparks rising above. —
 herders_crook

 good — The curved hook atop a wooden staff with a banded grip reads clearly as a herder's crook. Outline is clean, the hook highlight gives it form, and the diagonal framing is balanced. — —
—
 honey
Vector icon (still) player-facingcraftedProducts
 good — Amber gradient jar with a wooden honey-dipper standing in the neck and a cream label bearing a small bee, reading clearly as honey. Strong dark outline, consistent warm palette and a vertical glass highlight give it nice volume. Centred and grounded with a soft shadow. — —
—
 hourglass
Vector icon (still) player-facingtoolsPortal
 good — Reads instantly as an hourglass: a sturdy brown wooden frame with top and bottom caps, the classic pinched glass bulbs, and golden sand piled in the bottom bulb with some falling/seated in the top. —
 ink
Vector icon (still) player-facingfish
 good — A round deep-indigo flask with a lighter purple stopper and a single soft highlight, clean outline and good silhouette. Reads as an ink/dark potion and pairs cleanly with the amber fish_oil bottle by color. Centered and well framed. — —
—
 instr_bell
Vector icon (animation) player-facinginstruments
 good — The bell rocks left-right on its handle like a real swing and gold sound-arc rings sweep out beneath/around it in sync with the swing. —
 instr_drum
Vector icon (still) unusedinstruments
 good — Instantly reads as a drum: brown shell, cream skin with a glossy highlight, cream 'WWW' rope lacing, and a beater stick laid across the top. Clean confident outline, consistent upper-left light, good contrast on both backgrounds. Well centered and fills the box. — —
—
 instr_drum
Vector icon (animation) player-facinginstruments
 good — The drumstick arcs up and comes down to strike the head, and on the hit frame the drumhead flashes lighter with a visible impact ripple before settling. The motion is articulated (stick swings, head reacts) rather than a rigid slide, and reads exactly as drumming. Loop is clean since the stick returns to its start pose. — —
—
 instr_fiddle
Vector icon (animation) player-facinginstruments
 good — The bow slides back and forth across the strings and the body tilts subtly, with gold music notes appearing near the scroll. The bowing motion is the right gesture for a fiddle and the wood/string detail is crisp. Loop holds together with the bow returning toward its starting position. — —
—
 instr_flute
Vector icon (still) unusedinstruments
 good — Clean angled wooden tube with a row of dark finger holes, metal-band ferrules at the ends and a warm gradient down the barrel. Reads unambiguously as a flute and is distinct from the pan flute sibling. Well centered with confident outlining and consistent light. — —
—
 instr_flute
Vector icon (animation) player-facinginstruments
 good — The flute bobs slightly and the finger-holes/highlight shimmer, while gold music notes emit from the far end and rise/fade across the strip. Motion is gentle and appropriate; the carved wood and tone-holes are nicely drawn. First/last frames match well enough to loop. — —
—
 instr_lute
Vector icon (still) unusedinstruments
 good — Excellent read: rounded wood-grained bowl body with a carved rosette soundhole, strings, and an angled fretted neck with a pegbox. Confident outline, believable wood gradients, consistent upper-left light, good contrast on both grounds. Clearly distinct from the fiddle sibling. — —
—
 instr_lute
Vector icon (animation) player-facinginstruments
 good — The body rocks/tilts gently and the strings flicker as if strummed, while small gold music notes spawn near the neck and rise/fade in the mid-frames. Motion is organic and clearly suits a lute being played; the wood grain and rosette drawing are clean and well-shaded. First and last frames are close enough to loop without a visible jump. — —
—
 instr_pan_flute
Vector icon (animation) player-facinginstruments
 good — The pipes hold steady while gold music notes spawn at the top and rise/rotate-fade across the frames, plus a faint shimmer/highlight travels over the pipe bundle. Motion is modest but appropriate (you blow across pipes, so the notes carry it) and the tied-reed pipe drawing is tidy. Loops cleanly as the notes cycle. — —
—
 instr_tambourine
Vector icon (still) unusedinstruments
 good — Clean circular brown frame with a pale skin head and evenly spaced gold jingle studs around the rim; reads instantly as a tambourine. Centered, fills the box well, confident outline and consistent light with crisp gold highlights. Holds up on both light and dark backgrounds. — —
—
 iron_bar
Vector icon (still) player-facingmissingItems
 good — Same trapezoid ingot shape as copper/gold but in a cool grey gradient (light top, darker bottom) with a crisp highlight band, reading clearly as iron/steel. Color separation from the warm bars is strong. Clean outline, centered. — —
—
 iron_frame
Vector icon (still) player-facing(aliases)
 good — Reads cleanly as a dark steel frame with bevelled inner edge, four corner bolt-heads, and four blue-grey nub fasteners on the edge midpoints, with a glossy central rivet — consistent with the family's bold-outline glossy style and the gunmetal #6a7a86 cue. —
 iron_hinge
Vector icon (still) player-facingrecipes
 good — Two rounded steel leaf plates each with two screws, joined by a central knuckle/barrel pin, read instantly and accurately as a hinge. Cool grey metal shading with subtle rust dabs at the corners adds realism without clutter. Clean outline and good contrast on both backgrounds. — —
—
 iron_pick
Vector icon (still) player-facingmissingItems
 good — Reads immediately as a pickaxe: curved blue-grey double-pointed head with a central bolt hub and edge highlights, mounted on a ribbed brown wooden haft. Good metal gradient and confident outline; the head silhouette is dynamic. Framing fills the box well without clipping. — —
—
 jam
Vector icon (still) player-facingexistingFarm
 good — Reads immediately as a jam jar: gold screw lid, magenta-pink preserve filling the glass, and a cream label showing two cherries/berries.
