 tile_veg_cucumber
Vector icon (still) player-facingvegetables
 good — Clearly a cucumber: an elongated green oval angled diagonally with lighter-green dappling and darker speckles plus small end nubs. Good gradient shading and clean edge. Distinct in shape from all siblings, though it floats a touch low-right of center. — —
—
 tile_veg_cucumber
Board tile (still) player-facingtile_veg_*
 good — Unmistakably a cucumber: elongated bumpy green body with darker ridges and a lighter top highlight, leaning slightly but clearly centred on the pad. Surface texture reads as the warty cucumber skin without becoming muddy, and the silhouette is crisp with no stray pixels. The slight diagonal lean is fine and gives it some life. — —
—
 tile_veg_eggplant
Vector icon (still) player-facingvegetables
 good — Reads immediately as an eggplant: a teardrop purple body with a high glossy highlight and a green leafy calyx/cap. Rich purple gradient, clean outline, good light direction. Distinct and on-brand for the family. — —
—
 tile_veg_eggplant
Board tile (still) player-facingtile_veg_*
 good — Strong eggplant read: deep purple teardrop body with a bright specular highlight that sells the glossy skin, plus a green stem/calyx at top. Sits centred on the grass pad and the hue ramp from near-black shadow to violet highlight is deliberate and clean. Silhouette is crisp against the dark half with no haloing. — —
—
 tile_veg_mushroom
Vector icon (still) player-facingvegetables
 good — Classic toadstool: red domed cap with cream spots, gills hinted under the rim, and a pale tapered stem. Clean confident outline, good cap-to-stem contrast and consistent light. Highly readable and distinct. — —
—
 tile_veg_mushroom
Board tile (still) player-facingtile_veg_*
 good — Iconic toadstool: domed red cap with evenly placed white spots and a chunky cream stem, centred on the grass pad. Cap shading gives a rounded dome and the spots are crisp dots rather than smudges; stem has subtle vertical shading. Reads instantly and fits the cosy farm palette. — —
—
 tile_veg_pepper
Board tile (still) player-facingtile_veg_*
 good — Clearly a bell pepper: lobed red body with strong vertical highlights conveying the waxy sheen and a green curved stem on top, centred on the pad. The lobe separation and highlight placement read as a rounded three-lobed pepper, and the silhouette is crisp. Colour is vivid and on-palette for the cosy farm look. — —
—
 tile_veg_turnip
Board tile (still) player-facingtile_veg_*
 good — Excellent turnip read: white lower bulb with the characteristic purple shoulder and a full ruffled green leaf cluster on top, centred on the grass pad. The two-tone bulb (purple-to-white gradient) is exactly right and the leaves have good vein/value detail without going noisy. Crisp silhouette and clean edges against the dark side. — —
—
 tincture
Vector icon (still) player-facingrecipes
 good — Rounded green-liquid flask with a brown neck, bulbous red cork and a small label tag on a string reads cleanly as an herbal tincture/potion, helped by the soft green glow. Glass highlights and liquid meniscus are well done. The 'berry' identity rests only on the red cap and label dot, so it leans generic-potion, but it is clear and well-crafted. — —
—
 token_hearth_forest
Vector icon (still) player-facingcurrencies
 good — A brown wooden ring frames a green disc bearing a stylized cream antler/branching emblem — clearly the forest variant of the hearth-token set and consistent with its siblings. Clean outline, good figure-ground contrast, and the green clearly distinguishes it from the stone and tide tokens. Centered and filling the box well. — —
—
 token_hearth_tide
Vector icon (still) player-facingcurrencies
 good — Wooden-ring token with a blue disc carrying three cream wavy lines over a single droplet — instantly reads as the water/tide variant and is clearly distinct from forest and stone. Clean outline, strong cream-on-blue contrast, consistent with the family. Well centered and fills the box. — —
—
 treasure_chest_closed
Vector icon (still) unusedtreasure
 good — Reads instantly as a locked chest: brown wood body, gold lid corners, central keyhole plate, and gold corner studs all clear at size. Clean confident outline, consistent warm light from upper-left, sparkle accents on the lid. Well-centred and sits comfortably inside the magenta box. — —
—
 treasure_chest_open
Vector icon (still) unusedtreasure
 good — Strong read of an open chest spilling gold orbs, with a raised lid and a warm glow halo behind selling the 'loot' feel. Outline and shading match the closed-chest sibling so the pair is cohesive yet distinct (open vs closed). Coins read slightly as generic orbs rather than stamped coins, but at icon size it works. — —
—
 treasure_chest_open
Vector icon (animation) player-facingtreasure
 good — Clear genuine animation: the gold coins inside the chest shimmer and jostle frame-to-frame while small white sparkles on the lid blink on and off, giving a lively glint. The drawing is solid with a clean dark-wood lid, brass banding and a rounded coin mound. Motion is contained within the cell and loops smoothly with no hard jump or blown-out flash. — —
—
 treasure_coin_stack
Vector icon (still) unusedtreasure
 good — Cleanly reads as a stacked pile of gold coins with a single coin propped behind, edges striped to show individual coins. Good warm gold gradient, sparkle highlight, consistent outline weight with the family. Centred and fills the box well without clipping. — —
—
 treasure_crown
Vector icon (still) unusedtreasure
 good — Instantly reads as a royal crown: five gold points tipped with pearls and a jewel band of blue/red/blue gems. Clean outline, good gold gradient and sparkles. The drop-shadow ellipse floats a bit low/detached from the crown, but the subject itself is crisp and well-centred. Tighten the cast shadow up toward the crown base so it doesn't read as a separate floating oval. —
—
 treasure_gem_pile
Vector icon (still) unusedtreasure
 good — Clear pile of five faceted gemstones in green, gold, red, purple and blue, each with facet lines and a sparkle, reading well as a jewel hoard. Distinct from the goblet/ring gems by virtue of being a multicolor cluster. Colors are vivid and outlines clean; framing is centred though it sits a touch low in the box. — —
—
 treasure_gem_pile
Vector icon (animation) player-facingtreasure
 good — Animated convincingly: the central blue diamond brightens and its facets flash while the surrounding gems twinkle, reading as a sparkling jewel hoard. The composition is colourful and clear with a faceted star gem and a prominent kite-cut diamond casting a shadow. Motion stays inside the cell and loops without a hard jump. — —
—
 treasure_gold_bars
Vector icon (still) unusedtreasure
 good — Clearly three stacked gold bars with inset recessed faces, classic ingot trapezoid shapes and warm gold gradient with a top sparkle. Outline weight and palette match the family and it is distinct from the coin stack. Framing fills the lower box well and is centred. — —
—
 treasure_gold_bars
Vector icon (animation) player-facingtreasure
 good — Genuine animation present: a bright specular highlight sweeps across the bar faces and the accent disc behind brightens and dims, giving a clear shining-gold glint cycle. The ingots are cleanly drawn with beveled top faces, warm gold ramp and good stacking depth. Loops cleanly with the glint returning to start and no popping or drift. — —
—
 treasure_gold_key
Vector icon (still) unusedtreasure
 good — Reads as an antique skeleton key with a trilobe bow and toothed bit, gold with a brown outline matching the family. The diagonal tilt gives it energy and it stays clear of the magenta bounds. The bow holes are a touch dark/heavy but the silhouette is unmistakable as a key. — —
—
 treasure_map
Vector icon (still) unusedtreasure
 good — Instantly a treasure map: aged tan parchment with curled rolled edges, a dotted trail leading to a bold red X, plus a small compass/loop mark. Warm parchment palette and brown outline keep it on-family while standing out as the only paper object. Centred and well-framed. — —
—
 treasure_map
Vector icon (animation) player-facingtreasure
 good — Strong genuine animation: the parchment ripples in a gentle traveling-wave sway and the red X with its dotted path pulses, so the map clearly flutters rather than sliding rigidly. The art is characterful with curled roll ends, a tea-stained sheet and a bold red X marker. It loops smoothly with the wave returning to rest and no flicker or blow-out. — —
—
 treasure_ring
Vector icon (still) unusedtreasure
 good — Clear gold band ring set with a large faceted red gem, sparkle accent, and a subtle inner highlight on the band. Distinct from the other gold items by its open ring silhouette and single red stone. Clean outline, good contrast, centred and fills the box. — —
—
 trident
Vector icon (still) unusedtoolsSea
 good — Three silver prongs with a central spearpoint and two outward-curving outer tines on a brown wooden haft read clearly as a trident. The metallic prong shading and dark outline give it a confident, premium look consistent with the family. Centred and fills the vertical box well. — —
—
 trimmer
Vector icon (still) player-facingtoolsFarm
 good — Clearly reads as hedge trimmers/shears: two crossed silver blades meeting at a central bolt pivot with two long red handles splaying below. Good metallic blade highlights, clean dark outline, and a believable pivot; colours fit the family and it is well centred. The slightly twisted handle perspective is the only mild awkwardness. — —
—
 tutorial_hint
Vector icon (still) unusedfixed-icons
 good — A rounded yellow lightbulb with a grey base and a soft glow halo reads instantly as a hint/idea. The filament mark inside, clean outline and warm glow all support the meaning, with good contrast on both halves. Simple and unambiguous. — —
—
 ui_cancel
Vector icon (still) player-facinguiElements
 good — Instantly reads as cancel: bold red ring, clear diagonal cross, glossy bevel consistent with the family's glassy style. Well centered in the box with a clean confident outline and good contrast on both backgrounds. — —
—
 ui_clipboard
Vector icon (still) player-facinguiElements
 good — Clearly a clipboard: brown frame, gold clip, cream sheet with a bold green check and ruled lines. Good contrast and centering; the chunky green check is the focal accent and reads at small size. — —
—
 ui_enter
Vector icon (still) player-facinguiElements
 good — A bold green right-pointing arrow with a glassy highlight reads instantly as enter/proceed. Clean beveled outline and strong contrast on both halves; well centered. — —
—
 ui_farmer
Vector icon (still) player-facinguiElements
 good — Charming and accurate: rounded face, smile, freckles, and a banded straw hat with a feather plus green shoulders below. Reads as a farmer/person at a glance with clean outlines and warm palette matching the family. — —
—
 ui_heart
Vector icon (still) player-facinguiElements
 good — Textbook glossy heart: rich crimson-to-pink gradient, clear lobes and point, bright highlight. Centered, strong outline, reads instantly on both backgrounds and fits the family's glassy finish. — —
—
 ui_home
Vector icon (still) player-facinguiElements
 good — Clearly a home: gabled red-brown roof, warm orange walls, yellow-pane window, dark door, and a chimney with grey smoke puffs. Good detail and contrast; reads at a glance and matches the family style. — —
—
 ui_lock
Vector icon (still) player-facinguiElements
 good — Reads instantly as a lock: brass body with rivets, central keyhole, and a metallic grey shackle. Good gloss and contrast; well centered and consistent with the family's glassy style. — —
—
 ui_map
Vector icon (still) player-facinguiElements
 good — Clearly a map: folded parchment panels, blue waterway, dashed path and a red X marking a spot. Lots of legible storytelling detail; centered with a strong brown outline and good contrast. — —
—
 ui_pin
Vector icon (still) player-facinguiElements
 good — Clean teardrop map pin with a dark center hole and a bright glassy highlight, reads instantly as a location marker. Good contrast and centering, with a subtle ground shadow that matches the family. — —
—
 ui_portal
Vector icon (still) player-facinguiElements
 good — Reads as a magical portal: dark oval frame with a luminous purple core and a soft glow, ringed by small light nodes. Distinct from the other icons and consistent with the glossy treatment; centered well, though the glow is the main carrier of meaning rather than a hard shape. — —
—
 ui_settings
Vector icon (still) player-facinguiElements
 good — Crisp cool-grey gear with a clear hub and evenly spaced teeth, instantly reading as settings. Clean confident outline, consistent light direction, and good contrast on both backgrounds. — —
—
 ui_trophy
Vector icon (still) player-facinguiElements
 good — A clear gold two-handled trophy cup with a star emblem and base, instantly reading as a trophy/award. Confident dark-gold outline, consistent warm shading, and good contrast on both backgrounds. — —
—
 ui_warning
Vector icon (still) player-facinguiElements
 good — An orange rounded triangle with a centered exclamation mark, the universal warning symbol, reading instantly. Clean bevel, good gloss, strong contrast and well-centred in the box. — —
—
 ui_water
Vector icon (still) player-facinguiElements
 good — A glossy blue teardrop with a highlight and a small ripple beneath reads instantly as water. Clean outline, nice top-light gradient, and clear on both backgrounds. — —
—
 wand
Vector icon (still) player-facingtoolsPortal
 good — A diagonally-posed wooden handle capped with a faceted blue crystal that emits a soft glow and two sparkle accents — reads cleanly as a magic wand. Nice facet shading on the crystal, warm wood gradient, and the sparkles sell the 'magic' without overpowering. The diagonal pose leaves the lower-right corner a bit empty but it stays within bounds and is distinct from the staff/idol siblings. — —
—
 weapon_axe
Vector icon (still) unusedweapons
 good — Reads instantly as an axe: broad symmetric double-bit steel head with a metallic vertical gradient and a bound center wedge, on a wood haft. Clean confident dark outline, consistent light from upper-left, good contrast on both backgrounds. Well-centered within the magenta box, nothing clipped. — —
—
 weapon_bow
Vector icon (still) unusedweapons
 good — Clearly a curved wooden bow with a taut string and a nocked arrow (pale fletching/arrowhead at left, red feathers at right). The wood gets a nice rounded gradient and the thin light string reads on both halves. Slightly busy at tiny sizes because the string is hairline-thin, but framing fills the box and stays inside the bounds. Thicken the bowstring by a pixel or add a hair of contrast so it survives downscaling to board size. —
—
 weapon_bow
Vector icon (animation) player-facingweapons
 good — There is real change: the string and arrow shift across the cycle (a white drawn arrow and the red-fletched arrow alternate position) reading as a nock/draw motion. The bow limbs hold shape and the wood shading is decent. Loop is acceptable though the string redraw is the busiest moment. — —
—
 weapon_helmet
Vector icon (animation) player-facingweapons
 good — Nicely animated through secondary motion: the helmet stays put while the red crest/plume sways back and forth like cloth, which is exactly the right organic choice. The riveted steel face and T-visor are clean. Plume returns to start position so the loop is seamless and nothing pops. — —
—
 weapon_mace
Vector icon (still) unusedweapons
 good — Instantly a mace: spiky dark star-burst head with a rounded metallic core sphere on a wood haft with a small pommel knob. Good light direction on the central sphere, clean outline, distinct silhouette versus the axe. Well-centered and contained within the box. — —
—
 weapon_mace
Vector icon (animation) player-facingweapons
 good — Clearly animated: the heavy spiked head swings as a pendulum on the handle with the shadow tracking it, giving a satisfying sense of weight. The spikes and sphere shading are clean and read well at size. First and last frames are close so it loops without a jump. — —
—
 weapon_shield
Vector icon (still) unusedweapons
 good — Reads immediately as a shield: classic heater/pointed-bottom form, split red-over-steel field, gold star emblem and rim rivets. Good top-light, clean dark outline, strong contrast on both backgrounds and a clear distinct silhouette. Centered and fully inside the bounds. — —
—
 weapon_shield
Vector icon (animation) player-facingweapons
 good — Animated with a soft side-to-side rock/bob; the cast shadow shifts in sync and the star highlight slides across, giving a believable wobble. Drawing is clean (bevelled red face, riveted steel base). Ends near where it starts so the loop is smooth, and nothing drifts out of the cell. — —
—
 weapon_spear
Vector icon (still) unusedweapons
 good — Clearly a spear: long wooden shaft with a bound collar leading to a leaf-shaped steel head with a clean metallic gradient. Consistent light, confident outline, reads on both halves and is distinct from the dagger/sword by its long haft. Sits on a diagonal but fills the box and stays inside the magenta bounds. — —
—
 weapon_staff
Vector icon (still) unusedweapons
 good — Reads as a magic staff: wooden pole capped by a faceted blue gem with a soft blue glow halo selling the magic. Good wood gradient and a believable inner-light highlight on the crystal; clearly distinct from the other (martial) weapons. The glow is strong on the dark half and subtle on the light half but still reads; centered in the box. — —
—
 weapon_staff
Vector icon (animation) player-facingweapons
 good — Strongly animated: the blue gem blooms a soft halo in the opening frames, fades to a tight gem with small twinkle sparkles mid-strip, then the glow swells back by frame 14 so it loops as a clean pulse. Suits a magic staff well. The early bloom is on the strong side but stays soft and coloured rather than a blown-out white flash. Optionally cap the peak halo radius slightly so the brightest frame doesn't nearly fill the cell. —
—
 weapon_sword
Vector icon (animation) player-facingweapons
 good — Clearly animated: the blade tilts/sways gently and a small white gleam runs up to the tip (a soft flare peaks around frame 11) while the gold-ball pommel stays put. Motion is organic and suits a blade; first and last frames sit close so it loops cleanly with no teleport. The tip flare is bright but stays small and reads as a glint, not a blowout. — —
—
 weather_crescent_moon
Vector icon (animation) player-facingweather
 good — The moon body holds steady while small four-point sparkle stars twinkle on and off and shift position around it, giving a gentle night-time shimmer that suits the subject. The twinkle is genuine frame-to-frame change (stars appear, brighten, fade) rather than a rigid slide, and it loops cleanly since sparkles are cyclic. The moon is nicely drawn with cream highlights, soft craters, and a warm rim. — —
—
 weather_fog
Vector icon (animation) player-facingweather
 good — Horizontal fog streaks shift and slide sideways across frames at slightly different rates, giving a believable layered mist drift, and the soft light/dark banding reorganizes frame-to-frame so it clearly animates. The motion is a gentle traveling drift that genuinely suits fog rather than a whole-icon slide; the loop reads continuously with no hard jump. Drawing is appropriately soft and low-contrast for mist. — —
—
 weather_lightning
Vector icon (still) unusedweather
 good — Instantly reads as a thunderstorm: a well-shaded slate cloud with a clean dark outline and a bright yellow bolt with a lighter inner highlight. Light direction is consistent (top-left), contrast is strong on both backgrounds, and the silhouette is confident. — —
—
 weather_rain_cloud
Vector icon (still) unusedweather
 good — Clear rain cloud: a clean-outlined cloud with a smooth grey gradient and four diagonal blue rain streaks of two tones below it. Reads well at small size and is clearly distinct from the lightning and snow clouds in the family. — —
—
 weather_rain_cloud
Vector icon (animation) player-facingweather
 good — The cloud body stays static (correct, it's the source) while short blue rain streaks fall and recycle beneath it, with the streaks shifting vertical position frame-to-frame so the fall reads convincingly. Motion is organic falling rather than a rigid icon-slide, and the loop is clean because rain is a continuous cycle with no hard reset. The cloud drawing has nice cool-to-light shading and a clear silhouette. — —
—
 weather_snow_cloud
Vector icon (still) unusedweather
 good — Reads cleanly as a snow cloud: a light blue-grey cloud with a confident dark outline and several white star-shaped snowflakes plus dots falling below. Distinct from the rain cloud via the lighter palette and flake glyphs; good contrast on both backgrounds. — —
—
 weather_snow_cloud
Vector icon (animation) player-facingweather
 good — Snowflakes spawn near the cloud and drift down and outward across frames, growing in count and spreading lower, giving a believable gentle snowfall rather than a static sprinkle. Flakes are crisp six-point stars with subtle size variation and the descent reads organically; loop recycles without a jarring pop. The cloud itself is appropriately still and softly shaded. — —
—
 weather_sun_cloud
Vector icon (still) unusedweather
 good — Clear partly-cloudy icon: a warm yellow sun with evenly spaced rays partly occluded by a clean white-to-grey cloud in front. Good light direction and contrast, and the warm sun reads against both backgrounds; matches the family's outlined-cloud style well. — —
—
 worker_baker
Vector icon (still) player-facingcharacters
 good — A friendly face under a rounded white chef's toque with a cream/tan polka-dotted apron reads instantly as a baker and matches the warm-bread palette of the label. Clean outline, soft cheek blush, consistent light; distinct from the other workers by the toque and apron. Centered and framed well within the box. — —
—
 worker_baker_v2
Vector icon (still) player-facingcharactersV2
 good — Reads clearly as a baker/chef: the white pretzel-knot toque and white jacket are unmistakable role props and distinguish them from the field workers. Friendly face matches family style and the cream-on-cream stays legible thanks to the brown outline, including on the light background. Clean shading, good centering. — —
—
 worker_farmer
Vector icon (still) player-facingcharacters
 good — A tanned face under a woven straw hat with green clothing and brown suspender straps reads clearly as a farmer and the green ring ties it to the outdoor-worker group. Clean craft, freckles and rosy cheeks give warmth; distinct from Tomas (who has a beard and a different hat). Well centered; the straw brim reaches near the side bounds but does not clip. — —
—
 worker_farmer_v2
Vector icon (still) player-facingcharactersV2
 good — Reads as a farmer: straw brimmed sun-hat, green shirt and a small yellow wheat/grain sprig at the shoulder support the role, on a green field-toned badge. Distinct from Tomas (no beard, younger) and the lumberjack via the open straw hat and clean face. Solid outline, smooth gradient and good framing. — —
—
 worker_lumberjack
Vector icon (still) player-facingcharacters
 good — A bearded man in a brown pom beanie, a red plaid flannel shirt and a grey axe blade at the shoulder reads instantly as a lumberjack and is the most prop-clear of the workers. The plaid pattern is rendered cleanly and the palette is distinct; strong confident outlines. Centered and the axe head sits cleanly inside the left bound. — —
—
 worker_lumberjack_v2
Vector icon (still) player-facingcharactersV2
 good — Strong, unmistakable lumberjack: red knit cap, dark beard, classic red plaid/flannel shirt and a grey axe head peeking over the right shoulder. All three props reinforce the role and it is one of the most clearly characterized icons in the set. Clean outline, the plaid pattern reads at size and framing is good. — —
—
 worker_miner
Vector icon (still) player-facingcharacters
 good — Clear bust portrait on the family's slate-blue disc: brown miner's cap with a prominent glowing gold cap-lamp, friendly mustached face with rosy cheeks, and a buttoned brown work jacket — instantly reads as 'miner' thanks to the headlamp. Clean confident dark outlines, consistent flat shading, and good contrast hold up on both the light and dark halves; well-centred and fills the box without clipping. Distinct from siblings (farmer's straw hat, lumberjack's beanie), fully on-style. — —
—
 worker_miner_v2
Vector icon (still) player-facingcharactersV2
 good — Brown peaked cap with a glowing yellow headlamp front-and-center, friendly round face with big eyes, and a buttoned brown work jacket — clean confident outlines and consistent soft top-light shading that reads clearly on both light and dark halves. Well-centered in the magenta box, fills the gradient disc without clipping, and matches the charactersV2 family style (same badge treatment as char_bram/worker_lumberjack) while staying distinct. The headlamp is the load-bearing identity cue but is fairly small, so the cap alone leans generic. Consider slightly enlarging/brightening the headlamp lens (or adding a faint light cone) so the miner identity reads instantly without relying on the small lamp. —
—
 wtool_drill
Vector icon (still) unusedworkshopTools
 good — Instantly reads as a power drill: orange/amber body, grey pistol grip with finger ridges, and a clearly chucked spiral bit pointing right. Clean confident outline, consistent upper-left light, good contrast on both backgrounds. Fills the box well and is the most distinct icon in the family. — —
—
 wtool_hammer
Vector icon (still) unusedworkshopTools
 good — Clearly a claw hammer: dark steel head with a curved claw and a glossy striking face highlight, on a wooden handle angled down-left. Outline is bold and clean, light direction consistent, contrast holds on both backgrounds. Well framed within the box. — —
—
 wtool_nail
Vector icon (still) unusedworkshopTools
 good — Reads cleanly as a nail: rounded chrome head with a highlight, tapering grey shaft to a fine point, tilted diagonally. Metallic gradient is convincing and the silhouette is unambiguous. Slightly small/upper-biased within the box but framing is acceptable. — —
—
 wtool_saw
Vector icon (still) unusedworkshopTools
 good — Reads as a saw: dark rounded grip/frame on the left with a brass-toned inner ring, a grey blade extending right ending in clear triangular teeth. Teeth sell the subject and the metallic blade gradient is clean. Framing leaves a bit of empty space lower-left but it is well centered overall. — —
—
 wtool_scissors
Vector icon (still) unusedworkshopTools
 good — Clearly scissors: two blue finger loops at the bottom, a central pivot screw, and two crossed steel blades opening upward. Loops and crossed blades make the read instant. Clean outline and good contrast, though it is conceptually close to the pliers icon so the two should stay visually distinct. — —
—
 wtool_scissors
Vector icon (animation) player-facingworkshopTools
 good — Genuinely articulated motion: the two blades open and close in a real scissor action frame to frame, anchored at the pivot with the blue finger-loops steady at the bottom. The motion organically suits the subject and the open/close cycle reads as a clean loop. Best-animated icon in this set. — —
—
 wtool_screwdriver
Vector icon (still) unusedworkshopTools
 good — Reads cleanly as a screwdriver: red ribbed grip handle up top, chrome shaft, and a clear flattened flat-head tip pointing down-left. Bold outline, convincing metal gradient on the shaft, good contrast on both fields. Well framed and distinct from siblings. — —
wtool_wrench
Vector icon (still) unusedworkshopTools
 good — Reads as a combination wrench: open C-jaw at top-left and a hex ring/box-end at lower-right, chrome body with a believable metallic gradient. Silhouette is unambiguous and craft is clean. Sits slightly low-right in the box but framing is acceptable. — —
—
 xp_levelup
Vector icon (still) player-facingfixed-icons
 good — A bold green upward arrow with white 'XP' text and flanking sparkles reads instantly as XP gain / level-up. Strong contrast, clean bevel/gradient on the arrow and crisp lettering; the sparkles reinforce the reward feel. Slightly text-dependent but the arrow alone already carries the meaning. — —
